{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The output mentions a comparison to projected SGD but does not explicitly link specific claims in the text to evidence from the experiments.",
    "R1.7": "There is no mention of citations or any engagement with prior work beyond a vague reference to Polyak (1967).",
    "RX.1": "The output presents all findings as equally confident without acknowledging any uncertainty in the results or claims made.",
    "RX.3": "The output focuses on memory retrieval for generative agents, which is within scope, but there's no discussion of how it addresses other potential aspects of the problem.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are identified; the analysis focuses on improvements compared to a baseline.",
    "RX.5": "There is no discussion of provenance or traceability for the claims made in the output."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.95,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The output mentions a comparison to projected SGD but does not explicitly link specific claims in the text to evidence from the experiments.
rationale.R1.7: There is no mention of citations or any engagement with prior work beyond a vague reference to Polyak (1967).
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all findings as equally confident without acknowledging any uncertainty in the results or claims made.
rationale.RX.3: The output focuses on memory retrieval for generative agents, which is within scope, but there's no discussion of how it addresses other potential aspects of the problem.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are identified; the analysis focuses on improvements compared to a baseline.
rationale.RX.5: There is no discussion of provenance or traceability for the claims made in the output.
